722 GG0130H3_ON_OFF_FTWR_END_CD GG0130H3_ON_OFF_FTWR_END_CD GG0130H3 On Off Footwear End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to put on and take off socks and shoes or other footwear that is appropriate for safe mobility; including fasteners, if applicable at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
